issues.objection: Implication for 4.23 ('After your next major project closes, observe the residue: is your attention still on it three weeks…') gives a PM a concrete diagnostic to apply. The verse does not require buy-in to the metaphysics; it gives a falsifiable engineering predicate. STRETCHED tag is honest for the verses where the metaphysics exceeds operational scope; PM does not have to absorb the metaphysics.

notes: Skeptical-PM test: can this verse be applied to a roadmap conversation without first signing onto the Gita's frame? Yes — the engineering layer is operationally self-contained; the source pack carries the original at honest scope. PASS.
